subject: deselected micrographs
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I had a strange behavior of Warp this weekend: after processing around 3500 
tiffs all the new entries got deselected and they were not processed. I 
don't know why this happened. 
I can re-select the tiffs manually, but I don't know how to re-select them 
all, not one-by-one.

Thanks,
Gabor
